summary: Ran full backend pytest suite for ClipForge/Shotvi bug-fix verification. All 7 authorized bug fixes (BUG-001 partial, BUG-002, BUG-004, BUG-007, BUG-008 + Commit 4/5/6 regressions) verified. Result matches expected baseline: 89 passed, 11 skipped (libraqm-guarded Telugu shaping — expected), 0 failed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite is green at 89 passed / 11 skipped / 0 failed. The 11 skips are legitimate: Telugu shaping tests guarded by @requires_libraqm (ffmpeg's libass not built with libraqm on this host). Per-bug breakdown: BUG-002 (7/7 path traversal), BUG-007 (22/22 bg_color validation), BUG-008 (11/11 ASS escape), BUG-004 (6/6 _get_duration), BUG-001 partial (10/10 caption size+pill), Commit 4 caption positioning (9/9). No frontend testing performed (backend-only request).
rca of the issue: N/A — verification round, no bugs surfaced.
